instructions.summary: Install the Founder nightly Launch Agent so VerdeDesk runs autonomously every 4 hours
instructions.detail: The Founder Launch Agent (com.founder.runner) schedules nightly autonomous sessions via launchctl. It was scaffolded in Session 1. Install it now so the agent can run without you manually triggering it.
instructions.exact_action:
Run in Terminal:

  cp /Users/carlos.miranda/Developer/founder-os-seed/.github/launch-agents/com.founder.runner.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/
  launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.founder.runner.plist

Verify with: launchctl list | grep com.founder.runner
instructions.unblocks: Autonomous nightly runs — without this the agent only runs when you manually trigger it

result.note: Already installed as com.founder.runner — completed in same session, queue item stale
